thoughts: I find myself drawn to abstract and experimental art forms that challenge my perceptions. I'm curious about how technology can enhance these artistic expressions.
next_link:
Art Decó by Isabelita Teixeira - https://artdecotv.tokamk.com/ 

Exploring the innovative use of technology in traditional Art Decó style art, this link promises to be an intriguing and visually stunning journey through time.
